MyTrips.title: My Trips
MyTrips.loginSubtitle: Your personal travel collection. Save places from city guides and bookmark full road trips.
MyTrips.featureSavePlaces: Save your favorite landmarks, sights, and stops from city guides.
MyTrips.featureTrackRoutes: Bookmark city routes and epic road trips for later.
MyTrips.emptyTripsDesc: Start planning your next journey. Browse city guides or discover scenic road trips.
MyTrips.emptyPlacesDesc: See a landmark you like? Save it here to build your itinerary.

home.heroSubtitle: Curated city guides and scenic road trips for the modern traveler.
home.heroPromise: Curated city walks and scenic road trips, ready to launch in Google Maps.
home.heroRouteCaption: Real cities · Real landmarks · Your custom route
home.heroAdventuresHint: Scenic stops · day-by-day routes · open in Google Maps
home.featuredDestinationsHint: Handpicked destinations to spark your next journey.
home.metaTitle: ViaPins | City Guides & Scenic Road Trips
home.metaDescription: Discover curated city walks and scenic road trips. Build your perfect 10-stop route and launch it instantly in Google Maps.

commandPalette.title: Search ViaPins
commandPalette.hint: Start typing to search across all destinations…
commandPalette.hintSecondary: Cities and countries from our guides.
commandPalette.emptyHint: Check for typos or try another city.

continents.europeSectionDesc: {count} countries with cities, landmarks & GPS routes
continents.asiaComingDesc: Japan, Thailand, Vietnam and more — we're building the next continent collection.
continents.asiaSectionDesc: New continent — more countries coming soon

auth.saveRouteDescription: Sign in free to keep your saved places and routes.
auth.checkEmailDesc: We sent a sign-in link to
auth.checkEmailHint: Click the link in your email to sign in automatically.
auth.checkEmailHintSave: Your places will be saved automatically after you sign in.
auth.freeNoSpam: Free · No spam · Sign out anytime
auth.passportSubtitle: Sign in free to save favourite landmarks, build routes, and track where you've been.
auth.passportHeroSubtitle: Save places, build routes, and track every trip — all in one place, free.
auth.passportPerkSaveDesc: Mark any landmark with one tap
auth.passportPerkRoutesDesc: Order stops and download a GPX file
auth.passportPerkVisitedDesc: Mark completed routes after each trip
auth.authError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.saveFreeGoogle: Free. Ready in seconds with Google.

route.differentCityMessage: {city}, {country} is not part of your current route in {currentCity}. Each route covers one city only.
route.modeMismatchToAdventure: Adventure places are for road trips across {country}. Your current cart is a city route in {currentCity}.
route.modeMismatchToCity: City places belong to a walking route. Your current cart is an Adventure road trip in {country}.
route.differentCountryMessage: Your Adventure route is in {currentCountry}. {country} needs a separate road trip.
route.adventureCartLabel: {count, plural, one {# road-trip stop} other {# road-trip stops}}
route.cartMapsHint: Tap the pin next to any stop to open in Google Maps
route.cartSignInSave: Sign in to save to My Trips
route.downloadRouteGpxHint: GPS file for Garmin, Komoot, etc.
route.downloadRouteGpxWithExtras: Includes {count} new stops from your current trip
route.deleteError: Could not delete route. Try again.
route.reorderHint: Drag landmarks to change the order.
route.embedDesc: Paste this code on your blog or site. Your route appears as an interactive widget with a Google Maps link.
route.embedPreview: The widget shows {count} landmarks with {maps} navigation and {siteName} branding.

stays.title: Where to stay in {city}
stays.subtitle: Hotels near your route in {city}, {country}. Partner checkout — no Booking branding on ViaPins.
stays.metaDescription: Find places to stay in {city}. Curated hotel search via our travel partners.

adventuresHub.metaDescription: Explore our curated road trips and scenic drives. The perfect companion to our city walking guides.
adventuresHub.title: Road Trip Adventures
adventuresHub.subtitle: Pick a country — scenic stops, day-by-day route, GPS in Google Maps. Separate from city guides.
adventuresHub.empty: No adventures match your search yet.

adventure.heroSubtitle: Hidden gems, monuments and natural wonders beyond the cities. Build your own road trip.
adventure.infoStrip: We've structured this as a 4-day road trip with a clear visit order. Use the planner below — numbers show which stop comes first, second, and so on. Your cart auto-sorts. Open Google Maps for driving directions.
adventure.plannerTitle: Recommended route — visit in this order
adventure.plannerSubtitle: Curated {days}-day road trip. Follow the numbers so you don't get lost.
adventure.orderHint: Numbers show visit order. The cart auto-sorts your stops. Use Google Maps for turn-by-turn driving.
adventure.cartOrderInfo: {count} stops in your cart — numbered in visit order
adventure.allStopsHint: Listed in recommended visit order. Add stops individually or use Add full route above.
adventure.mapSubtitle: Tap a stop — driving directions in Google Maps

offers.savedHint: You saved this — book a tour, tickets, or a stay nearby
offers.forYourTripHint: Tours and tickets for places in your route

meta.defaultTitle: ViaPins | City Guides & Scenic Road Trips
meta.defaultDescription: Discover curated city walks and scenic road trips. Build your perfect 10-stop route and launch it instantly in Google Maps.

inspire.title: Inspire Me
inspire.welcomeSubtitle: Answer 3 quick questions and we'll find your perfect city — or let fate decide with a surprise pick.
inspire.seasonHint: Optional — helps us match the season
inspire.inspireReasonAdventure: Mountains, peaks, and adrenaline — this city is built for explorers like you.
inspire.inspireReasonRelax: Slow pace, beautiful views, and zero stress — exactly what you need.
inspire.inspireReasonCulture: Museums, architecture, and living history on every corner.
inspire.inspireReasonNature: Forests, trails, and fresh air — nature is waiting for you here.
inspire.inspireReasonBeach: Sun, sea, and sand — your perfect coastal escape.
inspire.inspireReasonHistory: Centuries of stories carved into every street and stone.
inspire.inspireReasonSurprise: Sometimes the best trips are the ones you never planned. Trust us on this one.

myTrip.title: My Trips
myTrip.subtitle: Your saved places and routes
myTrip.emptySavedDesc: Tap the heart on any landmark while signed in — it appears here.
myTrip.emptyRoutesDesc: Use "Add to Route" on landmarks, then save from the bottom bar.
myTrip.emptyVisitedDesc: After your trip, mark a saved route as completed to track where you've been.
myTrip.sharePromptDesc: You have {count} saved places — invite someone to explore with you
myTrip.shareCollectionHint: Send your place list with Maps links
myTrip.downloadAlbumPdfHint: Photos + Maps links · Save as PDF
myTrip.downloadMapsRouteHint: All stops in order · up to 10
myTrip.supabaseMissingDesc: Set up Supabase in .env.local to save your trip across devices.
myTrip.passportBioPlaceholder: Your travel story starts here — add a short bio soon.
myTrip.passportEmptyPostsDesc: Share your first travel memory — photos, tips, and a personal rating linked to a real place.
myTrip.passportPlacesCount: {count, plural, one {# saved place} other {# saved places}}
myTrip.passportEmptyTripsDesc: Start planning your next journey. Browse city guides or discover scenic road trips.
myTrip.passportEmptyTripsFilterDesc: Try All, Planning, or Completed — or create a new route while exploring.
myTrip.passportEmptyPlacesDesc: See a landmark you like? Tap the heart while exploring — it appears here.
myTrip.passportEmptyCollectionsDesc: Save places across a country and we’ll group them into private collections you can share and plan from — Dream Japan, Best Beaches, and more.
myTrip.passportCollectionsHint: Private collections by country — share any collection to invite friends into planning.
myTrip.passportCollectionSubtitle: {count, plural, one {# saved place} other {# saved places}}
myTrip.passportCollectionPlacesCount: {count, plural, one {# place in your collection} other {# places in your collection}}
myTrip.avatarPhotoHint: Tap your photo to upload — JPG or PNG, max 3 MB
myTrip.avatarUploadError: Could not upload photo. Try again or use a smaller JPG/PNG.
myTrip.avatarTooLarge: Photo is too large — maximum 3 MB.
myTrip.avatarInvalidType: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
myTrip.avatarHeicNotSupported: HEIC photos are not supported yet — export as JPG first.
myTrip.avatarNotSignedIn: Sign in to update your profile photo.
myTrip.avatarStorageNotConfigured: Photo storage is not set up yet — run setup-avatar-storage.mjs once.
myTrip.dnaSubtitle: A lightweight profile built from your saves and routes — no quiz, no effort.
myTrip.timelineEmpty: No activity yet — save a place or a route and it appears here.
myTrip.smartContinueEmpty: Add a couple of places to your route — your “continue” button shows up here.
myTrip.smartTopEmpty: Save a few places — we’ll highlight your top country here.
myTrip.smartTopCount: {count, plural, one {# place} other {# places}} saved
myTrip.passportMapSubtitle: Visited · Wishlist · Favorites — your path across the world.
myTrip.passportMapEmpty: Save places or complete a trip — your map fills as you explore.
myTrip.passportLevelNextExplorer: Save more places to become an Explorer
myTrip.passportLevelNextAdventurer: Visit more countries to become an Adventurer
myTrip.passportAchievementDesc_first_adventure: Save a place or create your first trip
myTrip.passportAchievementDesc_castle_hunter: Save a castle, fortress, or palace
myTrip.passportAchievementDesc_beach_explorer: Save a beach or coastal place
myTrip.passportTripCloneHint: Copy this trip into a new draft you can edit
myTrip.passportPostErrorSave: Could not save post. Try again.
myTrip.discoverSubtitle: Fresh memories from travelers around the world
myTrip.discoverEmptyDesc: Share a public travel memory — or follow travelers to fill your feed.
myTrip.tripDetailsMigrationRequired: Run migration 015 in Supabase to enable trip details
myTrip.collabNotOwner: Only the trip owner can invite
myTrip.collabPendingTitle: {count, plural, one {# trip invite} other {# trip invites}}
myTrip.passportMoreHint: Collections, posts, and advanced options — coming soon in this section.

onboarding.step1Desc: We show exactly 10 must-see landmarks — not thousands of confusing results.
onboarding.step2Desc: Tap once to build your day. Open in Google Maps or download GPX — free, no booking tricks.
onboarding.step3Desc: Sign in only when you want to keep your trip. No forced account, no hidden fees.

cityPage.landmarksHint: tap to add to your route
cityPage.mapSubtitle: Move the map — tap a photo pin for details or Google Maps
cityPage.mapPlaces: {count} places on map — no signup, no paywall
cityPage.mapSelectPlace: Tap a place — opens on Google Maps

actionLegend.title: One tap — that's it
actionLegend.plusDesc: Tap any place to build your day

CountryExplore.exploreModesTitle: How do you want to experience {country}?
CountryExplore.roadTripIntro: Scenic drives and curated pit stops
CountryExplore.cityGuidesIntro: Curated walkable routes in top cities

countryPage.pickCityDesc: Each city includes 10 curated landmarks with photos, stories, and verified GPS pins.
countryPage.heroSubtitle: Open any city below for 10 must-see landmarks — photos, history, and GPS routes.
countryPage.epicRoadTripsDesc: Leave the city guides behind — scenic drives, hidden stops, and a day-by-day route.
countryPage.metaTitle: Explore {country} | City Guides & Road Trips | ViaPins
countryPage.metaDescription: Plan your trip to {country}. Discover walkable city guides and unforgettable scenic road trips.

trust.title: What others get wrong · What we fix
trust.compact: 10 curated places · GPS verified · 100% free · No app
trust.fakeSolution: Real places with GPS pins — no booking scams
trust.feesSolution: Free forever · browse without an account
trust.appSolution: Works in browser → export to Google Maps or GPX

favorites.nudgeDesc: Sign in to keep it in My Trips forever

adventureBanner.subtitle: Scenic drives beyond the city guides · open in Maps

things-to-do.intro: The best places to visit in {city}, {country} — {count} curated landmarks.
things-to-do.metaDescription: Top things to do in {city}. Photos, tips, and maps.

3-day-itinerary.intro: A simple 3-day plan for {city}, {country} using {count} must-see stops.

hidden-gems.title: Hidden gems in {city}
hidden-gems.intro: Quieter corners and lesser-known spots around {city}, {country}.
hidden-gems.metaDescription: Discover hidden gems in {city} beyond the usual tourist trail.
